Stop prompting. Start engineering.

Dunce to Midjourney Pro takes you from absolute beginner to commercially capable AI image engineer.

  • Phase 1: Engine mechanics and foundational prompting
  • Phase 2: Aesthetic control and advanced parameters
  • Phase 3: Surgical in-painting and workflow systems
  • Phase 4: Character consistency and business models
  • Bonus: Post-Production in Photoshop and Illustrator
Dunce to Midjourney Pro
AI Image Generation Mastery

Midjourney Pro

Prompting, style architecture, surgical editing, and production-ready workflows.
